name: LiarLiar
description: Bluff your friends! Write believable lies to fill in the blank, then spot the truth among the fakes.
rules:
OVERVIEW
Trivia bluffing game. Each round asks a fill-in-the-blank question. Players write fake answers, then vote for the true answer among all options.

PHASES
Writing: each player submits write(text). A valid lie is non-empty and not the real answer. Unsubmitted players receive a safe default lie on timeout.
Voting: options are opaque ids with text. A player cannot vote for their own lie. vote(optionId) locks one choice.
Results: truth, authors, votes, and points reveal, then the next round starts.

SCORING
+500 for choosing truth. +250 for each opponent fooled by your lie. Highest score after 5 rounds wins.
